title: Supply Chain Manager - VRL Logistics - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - VRL Logistics - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
